mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_org_unit (unit_name, unit_code, status, admin_user_id, create_time) VALUES (#{unitName}, #{unitCode}, #{status}, #{adminUserId}, #{createTime})
INSERT INTO sys_unit (id, unit_name, unit_code, status, admin_user_id, create_time) VALUES (#{id}, #{unitName}, #{unitCode}, #{status}, #{adminUserId}, #{createTime})
mapper.select: SELECT u.id, u.unit_name, u.unit_code, u.status, u.admin_user_id, admin.username AS admin_username, admin.real_name AS admin_real_name, u.create_time FROM sys_org_unit u LEFT JOIN sys_user admin ON admin.id = u.admin_user_id AND admin.is_deleted = FALSE ORDER BY u.id DESC
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM sys_user WHERE unit_id = #{id} AND is_deleted = FALSE
